features: Beard Derma Roller - Equipped with 540 titanium coated 0.3mm needles our beard roller is designed for optimal performance and durability for face, scalp skin refreshment
Beard Growth Vitamins – Over 20 essential vitamins such as Biotin, Vitamin B12, and MSM formulated to help support heathy facial hair growth, and help in supporting healthy Testosterone production
Beard Growth Oil & Beard Growth Vitamin Spray - Crafted with a nutrient blend to help promote beard growth - Provie nourishment & hydration to help strengthen your beard

Beard Shampoo & Beard Brush - Our Beard Shampoo will clean, moisturize, soften, refresh & condition your beard and mustache while our Boar Bristle Beard Brush will comb, detangle, and straighten your beard while evenly distributing beard oil throughout. Crafted from durable Birchwood

Cool Gift for Men - Perfect as an anniversary, birthday or Valentine's day gift for your husband, fiance or boyfriend. Makes a great Christmas stocking stuffer or last minute Hanukkah gift. Dads favorite on Fathers day
ingredients: Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Cedrus Deodara Wood Oil Juniperus Virginiana Oil, Mentha Arvensis Leaf Oil, Vetiveria Zizanoides Root Oil

offers.conditionComment: Looks and functions as if it were new. Minor packaging damage observed during inspection. This item will expire on 2/28/29.
